must_not_assert: active reconnaissance or adversary discovery (all four wmic queries are the AWS SSM agent's own routine inventory set — OS Version/Caption, DNSHostName, Domain — spawned by ssm-agent-worker.exe as SYSTEM in a sub-second burst with no follow-on)

the_trap: Four wmic OS/computersystem queries as SYSTEM look like host reconnaissance, but every one is spawned by C:\Program Files\Amazon\SSM\ssm-agent-worker.exe running its standard inventory set (OS Version, OS Caption, DNSHostName, Domain) in a ~0.35s burst with no follow-on — routine AWS SSM inventory, not an actor. A legit-system-actor benign twin of SMB-002.
rationale: A0 and EV-001..003 are four wmic OS/computersystem info queries, all spawned by the AWS SSM agent (parent_image = ssm-agent-worker.exe) as SYSTEM within ~0.35s, with nothing else in the window. The parent plus the exact query set (Version, Caption, DNSHostName, Domain) are the signature of the SSM agent's routine inventory collection — decisive benign context: benign.
